title: 插画艺术风格创作
description: 这是一张高冲击力动漫武斗插画，重点是双角色对战、前后景层次、能量特效、动态姿态和场景破坏感。适合格斗游戏宣传、角色对决、二次元 PV 关键帧和战斗分镜。
prompt_raw: An anime-style illustration of a high-impact martial arts battle between two young female fighters in a traditional wooden martial arts dojo. In the foreground, a girl with black hair in a high bun wears a red and white Chinese-style martial arts outfit with baggy pants. She is in a dynamic, low, forward-thrusting stance, surrounded by swirling red energy and water splashes. In the background to the right, a girl with light purple hair in twin buns wears a green and purple Chinese dress with gold embroidery and black tights. She is leaping through the air in a flying kick pose, surrounded by swirling blue energy. The wooden floorboards are splintering from the intense impact, with debris and dust flying through the air. Above them hangs a weathered wooden sign with the text "武術会". The scene features dramatic lighting, a low-angle dynamic perspective, and intense action effects.
prompt_display_cn: 这是一张高冲击力动漫武斗插画，重点是双角色对战、前后景层次、能量特效、动态姿态和场景破坏感。适合格斗游戏宣传、角色对决、二次元 PV 关键帧和战斗分镜。
prompt_template_cn: 生成一张动漫风格的【动作类型】对战插画。场景位于【战斗场景】。前景角色是【角色1描述】，穿着【角色1服装/配色】，正在做【角色1动作】，周围环绕【角色1特效】。背景或右侧角色是【角色2描述】，穿着【角色2服装/配色】，正在做【角色2动作】，周围环绕【角色2特效】。画面具有强烈速度线、冲击波、水花/碎片/能量轨迹和纵深构图。整体为高完成度二次元战斗关键帧，动作清晰，表情有张力，光影强烈。
variables_json: [{"key":"动作类型","label":"动作类型","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"战斗场景","label":"战斗场景","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色1描述","label":"角色1描述","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色1服装/配色","label":"角色1服装/配色","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色1动作","label":"角色1动作","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色1特效","label":"角色1特效","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色2描述","label":"角色2描述","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色2服装/配色","label":"角色2服装/配色","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色2动作","label":"角色2动作","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"角色2特效","label":"角色2特效","type":"text","required":true}]
